ValidationRule.description: Blocks Decision stage when Phase 2 climate assessment is unmet. Citation: 40 CFR 1502.17; CEQ NEPA Phase 2 Final Rule 89 FR 35442 (May 2024).
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( nepa_phase2_applicable__c = TRUE, nepa_climate_assessment_required__c = TRUE, nepa_climate_assessment_complete__c = FALSE, nepa_process_stage__c = 'Decision' )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Climate assessment required under CEQ NEPA Phase 2 rule (May 2024, 40 CFR 1502.17). Complete the climate change assessment section and check Climate Assessment Complete before advancing to Decision stage.
